  1. sudokusolver.csp
  2. Constraint

Uses of Class
sudokusolver.csp.Constraint

Packages that use Constraint
Package
Description
sudokusolver.csp
Implements generic mathematical abstractions required to model and solve CSPs (Constraint Satisfaction Problems).
sudokusolver.csp.constraints
Contains classes extending the abstract Constraint class.
sudokusolver.sudoku
Models the core domain, structural components, and high-level abstractions of a Sudoku puzzle.
sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
Contains classes extending the abstract SudokuRule class.

  • Uses of Constraint in sudokusolver.csp

    Fields in sudokusolver.csp with type parameters of type Constraint
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<Constraint>
    CSPProblem.constraints
    The list of constraints applied to this problem.
    Methods in sudokusolver.csp that return types with arguments of type Constraint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Constraint>
    CSPProblem.getConstraintsForVariable(String variable)
    Finds all constraints that apply to a specific variable.
    Methods in sudokusolver.csp with parameters of type Constraint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CSPProblem.addConstraint(Constraint constraint)
    Adds a constraint to the problem.
    Constructor parameters in sudokusolver.csp with type arguments of type Constraint
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CSPProblem(DomainStore domainStore, List<Constraint> constraints)
    Constructs a new CSPProblem with a given domain store and constraints.

  • Uses of Constraint in sudokusolver.csp.constraints

    Subclasses of Constraint in sudokusolver.csp.constraints
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AllDifferentConstraint
    Ensures that no two variables in the constraint's scope hold the same value.
    class 
    AllEqualConstraint
    Ensures that all variables in the constraint's scope hold the same value.
    class 
    AllowedPairsConstraint
    Enforces that the values of two variables belong to a specified set of allowed pairs.
    class 
    AllowedValuesConstraint
    Ensures that each variable in the constraint's scope holds a value from a specified set of allowed values.
    class 
    AscendingConstraint
    Ensures that the values of the variables in the constraint's scope are in strictly ascending order.
    class 
    SumConstraint
    Enforces that the sum of the values assigned to the variables in its scope equals a specified target sum.

  • Uses of Constraint in sudokusolver.sudoku

    Methods in sudokusolver.sudoku that return types with arguments of type Constraint
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Set<Constraint>
    SudokuRule.apply(Sudoku sudoku)
    Translates this high-level Sudoku rule into a set of lower-level CSP constraints bound to the current game configuration.
